name: Ronit Raj
title: Open Source Developer & Full Stack AI Engineer
tagline: Open source developer and speaker at Open Source Summit India 2026 (Mumbai) - building production AI and full-stack systems from GRPO on AMD MI300X to 79%-OCR RAG pipelines.
credentials: OSS India 2026 Speaker · NHA PM-JAY Runner-Up · SIH 2024 Winner · GitMesh Maintainer

availability.message: Open to discussing AI/ML projects, full-stack development, or startup collaborations.

about.summary: I'm an open source developer and speaker at Open Source Summit India 2026 in Mumbai (Linux Foundation) on AI agent security and compliance in OSS projects - upgraded from lightning talk to a 40-minute session. I build production AI systems end-to-end: NHA × IISc PM-JAY Runner-Up for STG claim adjudication; PARAM blockchain credentials for ABV-IIITM Gwalior; GRPO on AMD MI300X; 79%-OCR military RAG (Smart India Hackathon 2024). Maintainer of GitMesh; co-founder at Garudex Labs. On the web since 2019 - my first project was a static HTML/CSS site; the arc since then is what matters.

sections.title: Where It Started
paragraphs: In 2019 I shipped my first website - a static hotel landing page with responsive layout, a mobile side nav, and vanilla JavaScript (still on GitHub as first-website). No framework, no backend - just HTML, CSS, and curiosity. That foundation is the through-line to today: PARAM on Base Sepolia, GitGambit over the GitHub API, PM-JAY pipelines on Gemma, and a 40-minute session at OSS India 2026.

sections.title: My Journey in AI
paragraphs: I started with a simple question at IIIT Gwalior: how do you make complex systems actually work? That curiosity grew into building production AI - from military intelligence platforms to on-chain applications. Winning Smart India Hackathon 2024 with a 79%-accuracy RAG system taught me the lesson that shapes everything I build: great AI isn't fancy architectures, it's shipping systems that hold up in production.

sections.title: AI Meets Blockchain
paragraphs: I'm fascinated by systems that combine intelligence with decentralization - on-chain typing arenas on Monad, NFT-based academic credentials, AdSense for terminals settled in micropayments. The interesting work isn't AI in smart contracts; it's building trustless systems where predictions and data provenance are verifiable on-chain.

sections.title: From Hackathons to Production
paragraphs: Build fast, ship faster, iterate. Co-founding Garudex Labs taught me the gap between demo and production is where engineering happens. Whether shipping EdTech serving 50+ students or maintaining open-source tools like GitMesh, the real work is error handling, feedback loops, and making sure the system doesn't break when real users hit it.

sections.title: Technical Approach
paragraphs: PyTorch and Transformers for models. FastAPI and Next.js for delivery. Smart contracts when decentralization adds real value. As an open source developer and OSS India 2026 speaker, I focus on secure, compliant agent tooling and code other developers can read, deploy, and extend - because the best AI is the one that ships and keeps working.
